# BashFileParser

<!-- Generated by proofd. Rule ID: bashfileparser. Do not edit manually. -->
<!-- Default Prefix: BA | Prefixes: BA -->

- [BA-01] maskQuoted() replaces all characters inside single/double-quoted substrings with spaces before running REDIRECT_RE on the command string. This prevents Rust/C++ type signatures like 'fn foo() -> &str>' or grep patterns containing '>' from being mistaken for shell redirect operators. String length is preserved so match indices map 1:1 to positions in the original command.
- [BA-02] Redirect tokens are removed from the command string by position-based splice (replace match span with spaces) using indices from the masked view, then the cleaned string is tokenized. This ensures redirect targets are not double-counted as command arguments.
